untranslatable_reason: Pattern formation detection (double top shape with two peaks at similar levels and valley between them) cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators. Requires multi-bar pattern recognition: peak identification, sideways consolidation zone, and breakout validation. The 'quick rise' and 'steep decline' are qualitative descriptors without quantifiable thresholds provided. Author also provides no specific numerical success rates for bull market regime or average rise percentage.
translation_notes: Mapped 'exquisite volume pattern' to volume exceeding 20-bar historical average. Used Donchian channels (dc_lower for breakout confirmation, dc_upper for exit reversal) as proxy for pattern boundaries and confirmation line. Stop loss set at 3.5% (above the 8% failure rate noted for 5% moves, reflecting worst-case Adam top placement). Hold period of 20 days reflects typical double-top duration. Signal marked untranslatable because precise double-top pattern geometry requires pattern recognition logic beyond single-indicator comparisons.
